name: pi-lattice
description: Pi Lattice multi-agent orchestration extension for Pi. Spawn specialized sub-agents with isolated context windows, custom prompts, targeted skills, Lattice Libraries, and a real-time web dashboard.

_dependencyNotes.dependencies: Packages Pi Lattice needs when installed or run.
_dependencyNotes.devDependencies: Tools and types for local development, tests, and builds.
_dependencyNotes.peerDependencies: Runtime packages the host Pi installation must provide.
_dependencyNotes.bundledDependencies: Dependency packages included with the distributed Pi package.
_dependencyNotes.trustedDependencies: Bun may run lifecycle scripts for these native/scripted packages.

scripts.build: bun build --target=browser --outdir=web web/app.tsx && bunx tailwindcss -i web/tailwind.css -o web/app.css --minify
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run build && bun run test
